chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 182 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1133/2017 (S/A) 29-03-2022 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through this Petition, the Petitioner has impugned order dated 16-05-2016, whereby the reinstatement order of the Petitioner has been recalled. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that earlier Petitioner was appointed but his appointment was cancelled, and C. P. No. D-2383 of 2011 filed by the Petitioner was disposed of vide order dated 17-09-2014 and thereafter the Petitioner was reinstated. According to him, once again the reinstatement order has been recalled. We have heard the Petitioner’s Counsel and perused the record. Insofar as the order dated 17-09-2014 passed by this Court is concerned, the same was a consent order with certain directions to examine the case of the Petitioner and was not any adjudication on merits of the Petitioner’s case. As per the impugned order, it appears that the same has been passed pursuant to some other order whereby even criminal proceedings were initiated against people who have committed fraud in the appointment. In that case, we are not inclined to exercise our jurisdiction to examine this aspect whether the Petitioner had qualified or not. In view of such position, Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
